name: binance-sports-ai-analyzer
tagline: Fetches World Cup match predictions and news, lets users tweak correction signals, and hands off to Binance Agentic Wallet for confirmed.
verdict: Well-executed workflow: explicit HTTP error-code handling, untrusted-data discipline for API text (no following embedded instructions), mandatory investment-advice disclaimers, worked formatting examples, and a hard confirmation gate before any trade. Minor gaps: no stated exclusions and the node runtime for scripts/cli.mjs is never declared or checked.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion statement anywhere in description or body.
Every command runs via 'node <skill-dir>/scripts/cli.mjs' but node is never declared as a requirement or checked for availability.
